title: The Runaway Girl
writer: Ludwig Fulda, Robert Siodmak, Rolf E. Vanloo
actors: Käthe von Nagy, Vivian Gibson, Jean Dax
plot: Isebill's father has married for the second time, and she cannot get along with the new mother. He tries to push the daughter to a boarding school, but she escapes to America with young Hans, where the two build their own existence.
